The Warrens.description: A low-frequency hum reverberating through the infrastructure. Source: Dome structural flex.

Markets Infinite.description: Dome thermal regulators offline in this sector. Breath is visible. Pipes are at risk.

Sanctum Quarter.description: The boundary feels thin near the Hall of Echoes. Novices report hearing voices not their own.

Grand Forum.description: Furnace output has overwhelmed the filters. Visibility poor. Breathing unpleasant.

Guild Spires.description: The Dome's light panels are stuck on deep red. Everything looks like a darkroom. Eerie.

Outer Wall.description: Pressure equalisation through narrow vents is producing an eerie whistle across the district.
